article_title: HttpClient 日志与可观测性：ILogger、DelegatingHandler 和 OpenTelemetry
core_theme: .NET 10 HttpClient 可观测性四层方案：内置日志 → DelegatingHandler → OpenTelemetry 追踪 → 指标
reader_takeaway: 从零搭建 HttpClient 的可观测性体系，按需叠加日志、追踪和指标三层
summary_angle: 从盲调的 HTTP 调用（无日志、无追踪）到全栈可观测（结构化日志 + 分布式链路 + 指标仪表盘）

information_blocks.source_anchor: 原文开头——微服务间 HTTP 调用出问题时看不到任何记录
information_blocks.visual_idea: 左侧：不透明的请求箭头，被遮挡隐藏

information_blocks.source_anchor: DelegatingHandler + 内置 ILogger 给出结构化请求日志
information_blocks.visual_idea: 中心：请求箭头穿过日志层，被标记上 Method/URL/StatusCode

information_blocks.source_anchor: OpenTelemetry 分布式追踪 + W3C TraceContext 自动传播
information_blocks.visible_idea: 右上：请求链路展开成分布式 Trace Span 树

information_blocks.source_anchor: System.Net.Http Meter 指标 — duration histogram, queue time, connections
information_blocks.visual_idea: 右下：仪表盘显示延迟分布和连接池状态

main_metaphor: HTTP 请求从被遮挡的盲区穿过三层可观测镜片后变得完全可见
primary_subject: 一条从左到右的 HTTP 请求箭头，穿过三层可观测滤片/镜片后变得清晰可见，并展开为追踪树和指标面板
subject_action: 请求箭头从左向右传播，穿过日志、追踪、指标三个滤片层
selected_style_prompt_descriptor: retro pixel-art inspired illustration, blocky forms, limited palette, old game composition cues, readable wide layout
selected_style_reason: 用户未指定风格，本篇从风格池随机选中；像素复古的视觉清晰度和分层感适合表达可观测性的模块化叠加
style_safety_note: 清单风格为泛类型描述，不涉及品牌、工作室或艺术家复刻
draft_goal: 验证从不透明到可视的三层递进叙事是否成立，四个信息块标签是否清晰可辨
revision_targets: 请求箭头主线不够清晰时强化
三层滤片的视觉区分不明显时加强对比
信息块标签太小或模糊时放大
final_prompt:
Use case: infographic-story
Asset type: wide cover infographic illustration for a Chinese tech blog article
Primary request: Create a wide infographic-story cover illustration. Theme: .NET 10 HttpClient observability from blind HTTP calls to full stack logging + tracing + metrics.

Summary angle: From invisible, untraceable HTTP requests → clear structured logs → distributed traces → metrics dashboards.
Narrative flow: 3-beat process. 2.35:1 wide frame, one dominant focal subject and 3-4 supporting narrative beats.
Information blocks:
- Problem (left): opaque HTTP request arrow, hidden, no visibility — label '不可见', fact '1'
- Mechanism (center-left): request arrow passing through a logging lens, tagged with Method/URL/StatusCode — label '日志', fact '2'
- Evidence (center-right): request spans expanding into a distributed trace tree — label '追踪', fact 'Trace'
- Takeaway (right): histogram and gauge panels showing latency distribution and connection health — label '指标', fact '3'

Main metaphor: An HTTP request arrow traveling left to right through three observability lenses that reveal its hidden details.
Subject: A diagonal flowing HTTP request arrow, left side dark and hidden, right side revealed and expanded into trace tree and metric panels. The arrow passes through three layered lens/filter stages.
Composition: Diagonal progression, dark-to-light left-to-right reveal.
Style: combine editorial technical illustration with selected visual style descriptor: retro pixel-art inspired illustration, blocky forms, limited palette, old game composition cues, readable wide layout. Stylized, polished, editorial, visually strong. Do not imitate a specific brand, studio, or living artist.
Color palette: deep navy, electric cyan, amber, soft purple.
Visible text: only 4 short Chinese labels: '不可见', '日志', '追踪', '指标'. No poster title, no long sentences, no English slogans, no fake UI labels, no fake chart axes.
Constraints: no watermark, no screenshots, no dashboards, no fake diagrams, no fake charts with real axes, no fake terminal output, no fabricated metrics.
Avoid: code rain, neon skyscrapers, generic robot poses, cyberpunk purple-blue overuse, dense HUD overlays, fake dashboard with numerical values.
